_description: Laravel-specific DB symbol equivalence pack (option 4 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md). Extends the stock DbOpRegistry with Eloquent / Laravel-flavoured method names that aren't covered by the generic CRUD-verb pattern. Use with --profile=db-aware-laravel together with --db-aware to fold Laravel-specific call shapes into the same canonical __DB_<OP>__ tokens as the rest of the recognised DB ecosystem. Compose with profiles/laravel.json (the framework profile) when both kinds of tuning apply.
